modules.name: Graph Traversal Engine
modules.description: Recursively parses nested UI node trees into a flattened, relational format.

codeUnits.name: FigmaNodeParser
codeUnits.description: Orchestrates the depth-first traversal of the incoming design payload.

parameters.name: rootNode
parameters.description: The raw JSON root node from the webhook payload.

validationRules: Input must contain a valid document ID
Node tree depth must not exceed 50 levels to prevent stack overflows

apiContracts.description: Receives component publish events from the external design tool.

dataModels.description: Stores the flattened, normalized representation of design components mapping to code.

fields.name: external_node_id
fields.description: Original node ID from the design tool

fields.name: css_properties
fields.description: Extracted style metadata mapped to standard CSS

steps.action: Calculate SHA256 HMAC of the request body and compare with the X-Signature header.
steps.onFailure: Return 401 Unauthorized and log security event.

steps.action: Acknowledge receipt to the external API by returning 202 Accepted with a generated jobId.
Execute depth-first traversal of the payload, normalizing variants into standard CSS JSONB objects.
steps.onFailure: Mark jobId as FAILED in database and alert observability platform.

steps.action: Perform bulk UPSERT operation into active_component_atlas table using the normalized data.
steps.onFailure: Rollback transaction and retry with exponential backoff up to 3 times.
